description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow with a complex, multi-level structure and a flat roof design. The exterior is predominantly light gray with several large windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. A spacious outdoor area features a rectangular swimming pool and a circular hot tub, complemented by a wide driveway leading to a garage. The building includes multiple terraces and balconies, as well as a variety of entry points and staircases. The overall layout is asymmetrical, with different sections of the house extending outward at various angles. The property is designed for luxury urban living, offering both privacy and open recreational spaces.
description: A modern, multi-level bungalow with flat roofs, large windows, a pool, hot tub, and expansive driveway, designed for luxury urban living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, pool, hot tub, and multiple terraces.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the elongated structure of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back terraces, additional entryways, and the overall depth of the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the hot tub, pool area, and secondary building sections.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and scattered smaller windows
